results.title: Wichita suburban school district looks to March election for $213M bond issue

results.title: Sea of devotees flocks to Hanumangarhi temple on Bada Mangal
results.description: Bada Mangal celebrations draw huge crowds to Hanumangarhi Temple in Ayodhya as devotees offer prayers and seek Lord Hanuman's blessings.

results.title: How NDA plans to move closer to two-thirds majority in Lok Sabha as Trinamool Congress rebellion and DMK...
results.description: NDA is exploring support from rebel Trinamool MPs, DMK and smaller parties to move closer to a two-thirds Lok Sabha majority ahead of key constitutional bills in Parliament. results.title: Odisha CM Writes to West Bengal CM to Drop “Dham” from Digha Jagannath Temple Name
results.description: Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi has written to West Bengal Leader of Opposition Suvendu Adhikari, requesting the removal of the word “Dham” from the name of the Digha Jagannath Dham temple complex in Purba Medinipur. Majhi said the naming has hurt the religious sentiments of millions of devotees of Mahaprabhu Shree Jagannath across Odisha [...] The post Odisha CM Writes to West Bengal CM to Drop “Dham” from Digha Jagannath Temple Name appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .
